# SusmiArtz — Home Bakery, Hyderabad

> SusmiArtz is a home bakery based in Suncity, Kismatpur, Bandlaguda Jagir and Attapur, Hyderabad, Telangana, India. We have been baking handmade cakes, brownies, donuts, and tea cakes for over 6 years. All items are made fresh to order. Orders are placed via WhatsApp and self-collected by the customer.

## Business Information

- **Name**: SusmiArtz
- **Type**: Home Bakery
- **Location**: Art by Giridhari Homes, Beside Time School, Hyderabad, Telangana, India
- **Areas Served**: Suncity, Kismatpur, Bandlaguda Jagir, Attapur, Hyderabad
- **Phone / WhatsApp**: +91 9700879944
- **Website**: https://susmiartz.github.io
- **Founded**: 2019 (6+ years of baking)
- **Hours**: 9:00 AM – 9:00 PM, Monday to Sunday
- **Languages**: English, Telugu, Hindi
- **Order Method**: WhatsApp order → self-collect (no doorstep delivery)
- **Notice Required**: Minimum 1 day advance order required

## What We Make

### Cakes (₹900–₹1200/kg)
Custom and classic cakes made to order:
- Pineapple, Butterscotch, Strawberry, Blueberry, Vanilla, Blackforest, White Forest
- Rich Chocolate Truffle, Nutella, Biscoff, Almond Butterscotch, Ferrero Rocher
- All cakes available With Egg or Eggless (+₹100/kg for eggless)
- Custom cakes: fondant work, character themes, decorations (price on request)

### Brownies (₹800/500g)
- Nutella Brownie, Chocolate Brownie, Triple Chocolate Brownie
- Walnut Brownie, Brownie Slab, Biscoff Brownie
- Available with egg or eggless

### Donuts (₹80 each)
- Nutella, Biscoff, Chocolate, Strawberry, Chocolate Chip, Mango

### Tea Time Cakes (₹300–₹400)
- Vanilla Pound Cake, Banana Tea Cake, Oats Banana Cake
- Wheat Nuts Cake, Millets Almond Cake, Ragi Chocolate Cake

## How to Order

1. Browse the menu at https://susmiartz.github.io
2. Send a WhatsApp message to +91 9700879944
3. Mention items, weight, egg/eggless preference, and collection date
4. Receive confirmation and collect from our location at Art by Giridhari Homes, Beside Time School, Hyderabad

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Is there a homemade cake baker near Suncity Hyderabad?**
A: Yes, SusmiArtz is a home bakery serving Suncity, Hyderabad. Order on WhatsApp: +91 9700879944.

**Q: Do you deliver cakes in Kismatpur or Bandlaguda Jagir?**
A: We currently offer self-collection only. Customers collect their orders from Art by Giridhari Homes, Beside Time School, Hyderabad. We serve Suncity, Kismatpur, Bandlaguda Jagir and Attapur areas.

**Q: Can I order a custom cake with fondant?**
A: Yes! We specialise in custom cakes with fondant work, character themes, edible images, and decorations. Contact us on WhatsApp for a quote.

**Q: How much do cakes cost?**
A: Classic cakes start at ₹900/kg. Premium cakes (Nutella, Biscoff, Ferrero Rocher) start at ₹1200/kg. Eggless cakes cost ₹100/kg extra. Custom cakes are priced based on design complexity.

**Q: Do you make eggless cakes?**
A: Yes, all cakes, brownies, and tea cakes are available in eggless versions.

**Q: What is the minimum order notice?**
A: All items require at least 1 day advance notice. Same-day orders are not accepted.
